item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response stays in direct decision analysis mode, treats the prompt as metric trend/risk tradeoff analysis, and does not fire any triage or repeated-repair framework.
